1.anchor: This letter is from John, the elder.
I am writing to the chosen lady and to her children,
1.note: Or the church God has chosen and its members.

5.anchor: I am writing to remind you, dear friends,

7.anchor: I say this because many deceivers have gone out into the world. They deny that Jesus Christ came

8.anchor: Watch out that you do not lose what we

13.anchor: Greetings from the children of your sister,
13.note: Or from the members of your sister church.
